name: Creamed Herring
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree the herring (including sauce) in a food processor or blender until smooth.
2. Add the finely diced apple and white onion to the processor.
3. Mix in the sour cream until fully combined and smooth.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Cocktail Rye Bread, Lavash Crackers, Broccoli, Cherry Tomatoes, Zucchini
